title: begonia korthalsiana
intro: Begonia korthalsiana, also known as the 'Polka Dot Begonia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is a type of rhizomatous begonia with heart-shaped leaves that feature vibrant, white spots on a green background. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves of Begonia korthalsiana can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and improving skin health.
